◎译　　名　红色家族 / Red Family
◎片　　名　붉은 가족
◎年　　代　2013
◎产　　地　韩国
◎类　　别　剧情 / 家庭
◎语　　言　韩语
◎上映日期　2013-11-06
◎IMDb评分  6.6/10 from 387 users
◎IMDb链接  https://www.imdb.com/title/tt3254646/
◎豆瓣评分　6.8/10 from 208 users
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/25731079/
◎片　　长　99分钟
◎导　　演　李柱亨 Ju-hyoung Lee
◎编　　剧　金基德 Ki-duk Kim
◎主　　演　金有美 Yu-mi Kim
　　　　　  正宇 Woo Jeong
　　　　　  朴玉出 Ok-chool Park
　　　　　  姜恩珍 Eunjin Kang
　　　　　  朴明申 Myung-shin Park
　　　　　  朴炳垠 Byung-eun Park
　　　　　  朴晓英 So-young Park
　　　　　  韩东熙 Dong-Hee Han


◎简　　介  

　　An outwardly happy family is actually a covert unit tasked with a dangerous mission... A moving drama that vividly evokes the Korean dilemma, written and produced by provocateur Kim Ki-duk. Its superb balance of serious subject matter and humor is guaranteed to elicit tears from viewers.

◎获奖情况  

　　第26届东京国际电影节(2013)

introduction: An outwardly happy family is actually a covert unit tasked with a dangerous mission... A moving drama that vividly evokes the Korean dilemma, written and produced by provocateur Kim Ki-duk. Its superb balance of serious subject matter and humor is guaranteed to elicit tears from viewers.
